overall.description: A slow, smooth drone flight through a narrow neon-lit canyon in a futuristic cyberpunk city, surrounded by towering buildings covered in holographic advertisements and glowing signage. The footage appears to be from Cyberpunk 2077, showcasing dense urban architecture with prominent commercial billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial street with holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: moving steadily forward through the neon-lit urban canyon, observing the towering advertisements on both sides

entered.detail: large vertical holographic billboard displaying 'BODY WITHOUT LIMITS' with a stylized figure in red and white tones
twin vertical billboards showing a muscular figure with text 'All Night. Every Night.' in yellow and white
tall futuristic building facade with dense grid of small illuminated windows and vertical neon strips
dark skyscraper with multiple stacked digital advertisements and glowing windows

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a slow forward movement through a narrow cyberpunk street canyon. The BODY WITHOUT LIMITS billboard dominates the right foreground while twin EVERY NIGHT billboards line the left. Tall buildings covered in neon and holographic displays rise on both sides, creating an enclosed, high-tech urban atmosphere with no visible pedestrians or vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial street with pawn shop signage

events.description: the large BODY WITHOUT LIMITS billboard exits the right side of the frame as the camera passes alongside it

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the street as the surrounding advertisements shift, revealing new storefront signage

entered.detail: illuminated storefront sign reading 'EL DORADO PAWN SHOP' in bright yellow neon letters against dark background

segments.scene_description: As the camera progresses past the initial billboards, the BODY WITHOUT LIMITS advertisement exits the frame to the right, revealing the EL DORADO PAWN SHOP neon sign. The EVERY NIGHT billboards recede to the left mid-ground while the dense urban architecture continues to line the narrow street, maintaining the immersive cyberpunk city atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward glide through a narrow cyberpunk street canyon that shifts its focus across a series of towering neon advertisements. It begins by moving deep into the urban corridor, where a dominant BODY WITHOUT LIMITS billboard on the right and twin EVERY NIGHT signs on the left frame the enclosed, high-tech atmosphere. As the camera progresses, the BODY WITHOUT LIMITS advertisement gradually exits the frame to the right, opening the view to the glowing EL DORADO PAWN SHOP neon sign. The EVERY NIGHT billboards simultaneously recede into the left mid-ground, while the dense, holographic architecture continues to line the path, maintaining a seamless sense of immersion within the futuristic city.
